sections.title: Search miRNA
sections.content: Type miRNA name (e.g., miR-30a-5p) to search directly.

sections.title: Search by number
sections.content: Typing '30' will automatically map to miR-30.

sections.title: Tail search
sections.content: Enter RNA sequence (AUGC, ≥5 bases) to search 3' tail matches.

sections.title: Family search
sections.content: Click 'Family' button to view all miRNAs in the same family.
